records.m_Talk_ENG: The mark of humanity advancing to treasure!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The mark of humanity advancing to treasure!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The mark of humanity advancing to treasure!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We stand together on the ocean, beneath the blue sky!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We stand together on the ocean, beneath the blue sky!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We stand together on the ocean, beneath the blue sky!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And even against the tidal waves, sail forth!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And even against the tidal waves, sail forth!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And even against the tidal waves, sail forth!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Why are you looking at me like that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Why are you looking at me like that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Why are you looking at me like that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-no...
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-no...
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-no...

records.m_Talk_ENG: No one can stop us. The Sigma Pirates...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No one can stop us. The Sigma Pirates...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No one can stop us. The Sigma Pirates...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yo ho!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yo ho!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yo ho!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good. All that's left is for Mone to join the crew.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good. All that's left is for Mone to join the crew.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good. All that's left is for Mone to join the crew.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um. I'm used to hearing the name, but how will we know whom to find?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um. I'm used to hearing the name, but how will we know whom to find?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um. I'm used to hearing the name, but how will we know whom to find?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can you give us a description of this "Mone"?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can you give us a description of this "Mone"?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can you give us a description of this "Mone"?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A description? Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A description? Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A description? Hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's got the force of the sun. The kind of person you can never forget!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's got the force of the sun. The kind of person you can never forget!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's got the force of the sun. The kind of person you can never forget!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please, don't do this...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please, don't do this...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please, don't do this...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, we're not all that bad, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, we're not all that bad, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, we're not all that bad, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We didn't think to find treasure like you at such a remote location, keh heh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We didn't think to find treasure like you at such a remote location, keh heh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We didn't think to find treasure like you at such a remote location, keh heh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, those are bad people who got tan under the sun. And not that kind of "force," either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, those are bad people who got tan under the sun. And not that kind of "force," either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, those are bad people who got tan under the sun. And not that kind of "force," either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She is undoubtedly beautiful, but... they're quite clingy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She is undoubtedly beautiful, but... they're quite clingy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She is undoubtedly beautiful, but... they're quite clingy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's Mone's mom!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's Mone's mom!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's Mone's mom!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her mom?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her mom?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her mom?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you hear that, Credere? She's got a daughter!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you hear that, Credere? She's got a daughter!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you hear that, Credere? She's got a daughter!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Does that make sen
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Does that make sen
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Does that make sen
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ignoring a woman's boundaries even after they said "no."
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ignoring a woman's boundaries even after they said "no."
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ignoring a woman's boundaries even after they said "no."

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is punishable by death.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is punishable by death.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is punishable by death.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, they might be a couple of ruffians, but maybe we should try to talk to them first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, they might be a couple of ruffians, but maybe we should try to talk to them first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, they might be a couple of ruffians, but maybe we should try to talk to them first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. Based on phrenology, people like that don't know how to converse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. Based on phrenology, people like that don't know how to converse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. Based on phrenology, people like that don't know how to converse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. Bad people. Don't bully Mone's mom!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. Bad people. Don't bully Mone's mom!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. Bad people. Don't bully Mone's mom!

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-Sigma Lady?
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-Sigma Lady?
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-Sigma Lady?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah? Who do you think you are?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah? Who do you think you are?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah? Who do you think you are?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Go home, you scrawny little brats!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Go home, you scrawny little brats!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Go home, you scrawny little brats!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... I was going to grab them by their wrists, but it seems like this won't be resolved by talking.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... I was going to grab them by their wrists, but it seems like this won't be resolved by talking.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... I was going to grab them by their wrists, but it seems like this won't be resolved by talking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They look pretty tough. Are you sure you can take them, Credere?
records.m_Talk_DEU: They look pretty tough. Are you sure you can take them, Credere?
records.m_Talk_FRA: They look pretty tough. Are you sure you can take them, Credere?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Credere?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Credere?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Credere?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, you, Credere. Chief and I are not trained to fight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, you, Credere. Chief and I are not trained to fight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, you, Credere. Chief and I are not trained to fight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no running away now, brats!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no running away now, brats!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no running away now, brats!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, we won't go easy on you just because you're kids!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, we won't go easy on you just because you're kids!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, we won't go easy on you just because you're kids!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bring it on!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bring it on!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bring it on!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey!
